introductionSomali: Unit-kan waxaad ku baranaysaa noocyada guryaha, qolalka, alaabta, there is/there are, prepositions of place, where questions iyo sharaxaadda qol ama guri tusaale ah.

practiceExercises.question: “Home” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Home macnihiisu waa hoy/guri.

practiceExercises.question: U turjun: House
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: House waa dhismaha guri.

practiceExercises.question: English ku dooro: guri dabaq ah
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: guri dabaq ah waa Apartment.

practiceExercises.question: Dooro qaabka saxda ah: ___ a table in the room.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Table waa singular, sidaas darteed there is.

practiceExercises.question: Dooro qaabka saxda ah: ___ two chairs.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Two chairs waa plural.

practiceExercises.question: The book is ___ the table.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: On waxay muujisaa in shay dusha saaran yahay.

practiceExercises.question: The shoes are ___ the bed.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Under waxay muujisaa hoosta.

practiceExercises.question: Habee: room / a / there / is / bed / the / in
options: There is a bed in the room.
practiceExercises.correctAnswer: There is a bed in the room.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: There is + singular noun + place.

practiceExercises.question: Su’aasha plural-ka saxda ah dooro.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Keys waa plural, sidaas darteed where are.

practiceExercises.question: “There is two chairs” waa jumlad sax ah.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Waxaa sax ah: There are two chairs.

practiceExercises.question: Scenario: A bed is near the window. A lamp is next to the bed. Aaway lamp-ku?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Scenario-gu wuxuu sheegay next to the bed.

practiceExercises.question: Dooro jawaabta: Is there a bathroom?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Is there waxaa looga jawaabaa yes, there is.

practiceExercises.question: Ku hadal: sharax meesha saddex shay yaallaan.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Isticmaal qol iyo alaab tusaale ah.

practiceExercises.question: Qor laba jumladood oo ku saabsan Noocyada guryaha.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Isticmaal there is/are iyo preposition sax ah.
